title: CloudFormation | SonarQube Cloud Documentation
content:
# CloudFormation

## [Language-specific properties](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/cloudformation/#language-specific-properties "Language-specific properties")

Discover and update CloudFormation-specific [properties](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/analysis-parameters/ "properties") in: Project **Administration** > **General Settings** > **Languages** > **CloudFormation**

## [Supported versions, formats and providers](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/cloudformation/#supported-versions-formats-and-providers "Supported versions, formats and providers")

- CloudFormation with AWSTemplateFormatVersion 2010-09-09 (YAML and JSON)

## [Related pages](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/cloudformation/#related-pages "Related pages")

For CloudFormation you can import `cfn-lint` reports. See *Your Project* > **Administration** > **General Settings** > **External Analyzers** > **CloudFormation** to specify the file path.
